name: Aucma Co.,Ltd.
summary: Aucma Co.,Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells refrigeration equipment in China and internationally. It offers household and commercial freezers; single door, double door, three door, five door, and side by side door refrigerators, as well as wine coolers; vending machines, such as beverage machines, integrated machines, and milk machines; and ultralow temperature equipment. It also provides electric bicycles, washing machines, and household appliances. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Qingdao, China.
